name: Palletizing Pattern Planning
description: A robotics engineer at a packaging facility is commissioning a new palletizing cell. Validate robot reach for 12+ placement positions on a standard pallet layer using the ZMQ Remote API. The validation must use a grid layout of at least 3 rows × 4 columns with cell spacing between 0.04-0.15m, comparing target positions to actual achieved positions. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pallet_positions.csv (including cell_id, row, col, target_x, target_y, target_z, actual_x, actual_y, actual_z, deviation_mm) and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pallet_report.json (including grid_rows, grid_cols, total_positions, cell_spacing_x_m, cell_spacing_y_m, mean_deviation_mm, max_deviation_mm, positions_within_5mm, pattern_accuracy_pct). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
